cells.data:
Collection Index

Currently the index contains a aummary version of every object in the collection. However, what about creating an index for secific fields. For example, how do we get all posts that have a particular tag. Do we need to have an index for this?

Key/Value pair Lists

Should we make lists have key/value pairs? It would be nice to have things like tags and authors have key/value pairs for readable and URL formatted values

Gallery & Depot to Blog type schema?

Gallery and Depot store all data for every file in the main JSON file instead of having a JSON from for every file/image. What if we made it work similar to blog where every file had it's own JSON file with the summary data inside of the index.
